home.docDesc: Select a product to access troubleshooting guides, general workflows and detailed maintenance steps via the left sidebar.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.email1Desc: Receive all after-sales service feedback, coordinate processing and reply.
contact.email2Desc: Receive complaints about after-sales service handling exceptions and issue escalation.

sopData.Irregular deviation between test results: Irregular deviation between test results and reference values

sopData.Contact the client to obtain device info:
Contact the client to obtain device information and logs.
TISO3: Home > More > Data Export > Log > Export logs and config to USB.
TISO2: Home > System > Data Export.
sopData.Bug not present in hardware fault catego: Bug not present in hardware fault categories
sopData.Check if the model in use matches the te:
Check if the model in use matches the test sample:
Home > Product Switch
sopData.Test results consistently deviate by a c: Test results consistently deviate by a certain range from lab reference values (positive or negative)
sopData.Provide the latest software version. Coo: Provide the latest software version. Coordinate remote update with the client.
sopData.IAS develops a new software version. Coo: IAS develops a new software version. Coordinate remote update with the client.
sopData.Guide the client to switch model or send: Guide the client to switch model or send samples
sopData.Adjust the intercept B value as per user: Adjust the intercept B value as per user manual section 6.3 Calibration
sopData.Provide new model. Coordinate remote upd: Provide new model. Coordinate remote update after payment.
sopData.Client device connected to WiFi, enable: Client device connected to WiFi, enable remote assistance
sopData.Contact the client to provide device inf:
Contact the client to provide device information and logs:
TISO3 version:
1. Home > More > Data Export > Log > Export logs, parameter configs, etc., select time range > Export to USB > Confirm; send exported files to IAS FAE email:
2. Home > More > About Instrument > View device ID, spectrometer ID, model name, device usage time, lamp remaining time, software version, motor version
TISO2 version:
1. Home > System > Data Export > Export logs, parameter configs, etc., select product list and time range > Export to USB > Confirm; send exported files to IAS FAE email:
2. Home > System > System Settings > View software information, etc.
sopData.Model used for a long time without updat:
Model used for a long time without update; needs a new model.
Prepare: 
1. Test sample type
2. Sample growing environment (climate, average temperature, fertilization, etc.)
sopData.Model has been used a long time without:
Model has been used a long time without update; company has a new model available.
Check: 
1. Test sample type
2. Sample growing environment
sopData.Expand model data: the client needs to p: Expand model data: the client needs to provide 200 test samples + reference values (the substance content of the test samples must have a gradient and the samples must come from a wide range of origins; samples with a single content level are not acceptable) + scan spectra of the test samples. Coordinate remote update with the client.
sopData.Create new model data: the client needs: Create new model data: the client needs to provide 200 test samples + reference values (the substance content of the test samples must have a gradient and the samples must come from a wide range of origins; samples with a single content level are not acceptable) + scan spectra of the test samples. After payment, coordinate remote update with the client.
sopData.Model is not localized; supplementary da:
Model is not localized; supplementary data is needed.
Prepare: 
1. Test sample type
2. Sample growing environment (climate, average temperature, fertilization, etc.)
